---
title: "Resume"
---

[Download Resume PDF](files/Daniel_Fulk_Resume.pdf)

## Contact

**Email:** danielfulk317@gmail.com
**Phone:** (336)-972-7062  

## Education

### University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill  
**Master of Applied Data Science (MADS)**  
Completed April 2026

**B.S. Economics, Minor in Data Science**  
May 2024

**GPA:** 3.14

### Honors and Awards

- Dean's List

## Technical Skills

Python, SQL, pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras, Optuna, Plotly, Streamlit, GitHub, Jupyter, data cleaning, feature engineering, predictive modeling, machine learning, data visualization, sports analytics, and applied data science.

## Selected Projects

### Next-Pitch Prediction in Baseball  
**Analyst**  
Chapel Hill, NC  
May 2025

- Built a machine learning pipeline to predict the next pitch type in MLB games using Statcast and Baseball Savant pitch-level data.
- Led a data engineering process that used streaming ingestion, lagged features, pitcher/batter-specific historical tendencies, and score-context variables to create a game-aware feature set.
- Implemented and compared logistic regression, random forest, and neural network models, tuning hyperparameters with Optuna and validating performance across MLB divisions for generalizability.
- Designed an ensemble model that integrated neural network and tree-based predictors, improving class balance and achieving 46% accuracy.
- Delivered a research-backed sports analytics framework showing how pitch sequencing, game context, and player tendencies can be modeled to support predictive insight in baseball strategy.

### NBA Shot Chart Data Visualization Tool  
**Developer**  
Chapel Hill, NC  
August 2025

- Developed an interactive 3D NBA shot analytics platform in Python using Plotly and Streamlit to visualize player shooting performance spatially and contextually.
- Designed custom 3D half-court geometry and parabolic shot trajectories to visualize shot paths in real time based on each attempt's position relative to the hoop.
- Engineered zone-based field goal percentage models comparing player efficiency to league averages using NBA Stats API data and dynamic binning algorithms.
- Applied spatial data processing and statistical aggregation to derive performance differentials across shot zones and shooting contexts.
- Optimized data pipelines and caching logic to support real-time analytical exploration without redundant API queries.

## Work Experience and Community Involvement

### Javara Research  
**Intern with the Finance Team**  
Winston-Salem, NC  
2023 - Current

- Identified potential monthly incremental revenue from changes in how patients were screened for clinical trials based on screen-fail payment terms, with the highest month totaling up to $2,986,589.25.
- Conducted patient-level data cleaning in the clinical trial management system to ensure accurate aggregate metrics for each study and precise record keeping.
- Contributed to building new trials in the clinical trial management system to align with sponsor-approved protocols, helping ensure that trial data and related financial information were recorded and managed correctly.

### North Stokes High School Boys Basketball  
**Assistant Varsity Basketball Coach**  
Danbury, NC  
September 2025 - Present

- Teach and simplify complex basketball concepts, translating advanced strategies into actionable skills that improve player execution and team performance.
- Bridge the gap between coaching knowledge and player execution by building understanding, confidence, and consistency across varied skill levels.
- Collaborate on strategy to maximize team strengths and develop adaptable game plans that promote efficient, winning basketball.

## Additional Information

- Cryptocurrency Club
- Business Technology Club
- UNC COVID Testing Center Volunteer
